pom.xml.general_idea: Set Spring Boot as the parent POM to manage dependency versions and build configuration.
Change project packaging from WAR to JAR to align with Spring Boot executable jar format.
Replace individual Spring Framework dependencies with Spring Boot Starter Web.
Add Spring Boot Starter Security dependency.
Replace MyBatis Spring dependency with MyBatis Spring Boot Starter.
Replace JSTL dependency with H2 database dependency.

src/main/java/com/example/onlineeducatio.general_idea: Add imports for JWT utility and Spring Security context to support authentication features.
Add login endpoint to authenticate users and return JWT tokens.
Add register endpoint to create new user accounts.
Add endpoint to retrieve details of the currently authenticated user.
Add helper classes for authentication response and user payload serialization.
Replace Spring's @Repository annotation with MyBatis's @Mapper annotation to align with MyBatis best practices for mapper interfaces.
Add a new method signature to the UserMapper interface to support user authentication by username.
Add a roles field and its corresponding getter and setter methods to the User model class.
Add method to retrieve a user by their username for authentication purposes.
Add method to verify a raw password against an encoded password hash.
Add method to register a new user in the system.
Inject RoleMapper dependency to enable role-based logic in user service.
Enhance getUserById to mask password and populate user roles.
Enhance getAllUsers to mask passwords and populate roles for all users.
Enhance addUser to assign a default 'USER' role upon creation.
Implement getUserByUsername to fetch user by username with roles.
Implement checkPassword for plain text password comparison.
Implement registerUser to insert user and assign default role.

src/main/resources/mappers/UserMapper.xm.general_idea: Add a new SQL query to retrieve a user by their username.
src/main/resources/mappers/UserMapper.xm.after: <select id="selectUserByUsername" resultMap="UserResultMap"> SELECT * FROM users WHERE username = #{username} </select>

src/main/resources/mappers/UserMapper.xm.general_idea: Enable automatic population of the generated primary key ID after inserting a new user.

src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/web.xml.general_idea: Remove Spring MVC XML configuration in favor of Spring Boot auto-configuration.
src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/web.xml.after: <!-- Spring Boot does not require web.xml; minimal placeholder for IDE validators. -->

src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/web.xml.general_idea: Downgrade web.xml schema version and namespace from Java EE 8 (4.0) to Java EE 6 (3.0).
